summary: Implemented ADR 0184 in repo truth, replayed the guest-label convergence from the latest-main worktree, verified the new Proxmox tags on the existing managed guests, and recorded the pre-existing PostgreSQL standby drift where VM 151 is still absent on the live host.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with jsonschema --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_failure_domain_policy.py tests/test_validate_service_catalog.py tests/test_service_redundancy.py tests/test_standby_capacity.py` passed with `17 passed in 0.67s`.
`uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` passed after regenerating `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml` from the updated host vars.

`scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` exited 0 but printed arithmetic-syntax errors in its warning helpers, and `scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models` still fails on the existing `ansible_scope_runner.py validate` catalog issue for `playbooks/proxmox-staging-bridge.yml` before reaching the direct ADR 0184 validator.

`ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False uvx --from ansible-core ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/proxmox-install.yml --syntax-check --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519` passed.

`ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False make provision-guests` reached the updated guest role but failed on existing live drift because `qm status 151` reports `postgres-replica-lv3` missing and template `9002` for `lv3-postgres-host` is absent on the host.

`LV3_RUN_ID=ws0184labels ./scripts/run_with_namespace.sh ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/site.yml --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 --tags guests -e @.local/ws-0184-proxmox-guests-active.json` completed successfully against the existing guest set `110/120/130/140/150/160`.
The final `qm config` tag snapshot confirms ADR 0184 labels on `110/120/130/140/150/160`, including `aag-*`, `fd-host-proxmox-florin`, `pc-*`, and the recovery waiver tag on `backup-lv3`.
`qm list` still shows no `151`, and `qm status 151` returns `Configuration file 'nodes/Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base/qemu-server/151.conf' does not exist`.

notes: Protected integration files intentionally remain untouched on this workstream branch: `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml` still need a normal merge-to-main decision path.

The backup guest required one explicit `qm set 160 --tags ...` follow-up after the scoped replay so its live recovery tags matched the repo policy; that manual host command is documented in the summary evidence file.

The missing `postgres-replica-lv3` object and missing template `9002` are pre-existing live drift outside ADR 0184 and should remain visible until a separate recovery or reprovisioning change repairs them.
